title: ReviewVerdict
description: Structured review verdict per claude-codex-bridge references/05_review_contract.md (V01R02). STRICT-MODE compliant for codex --output-schema (OpenAI structured outputs: every object lists ALL properties in required, additionalProperties false). Verified working 2026.07.10.

scope_check.description: 'ok' if inputs complete and scope matched; otherwise 'REVIEW_BLOCKED: INPUT_INCOMPLETE - <missing>' and all issue arrays must be empty

fixed_verified.description: Issue IDs from previous round confirmed FIXED by checking the actual file (empty array on round 1)

still_present.description: Issue IDs from previous round that remain — mark RECURRING (empty array on round 1)

context_repairs.description: Systemic rule-gap proposals; empty array = none

recurring.description: true if same class of issue appeared before; false otherwise

impact.description: concrete consequence + trigger condition; no vague wording
